narrative: All broken items and opportunities resolved. B1: output_dir wired via {workflow.output_dir} in Stages 3-4. B2: 9 tests for scan-sources.py. O1: decision-log moved to skill root. O2: headless collapsed to reference. O3: auto_fixes in headless return. O4: sibling skills in Stage 1c. O5: mode_conflict blocked reason. O6: vague_terms serialization comment. O7: template placeholder comment. O8: decision-log finalize audit. O9: subagent fallback. O10: bilingual section matching. O11: sys.exit(0) added. 20/20 tests pass.

broken.title: {output_file} undefined in script invocation; output_dir declared but never consumed
broken.detail: Stage 4 runs: python3 {workflow.validation_script} {output_file} ... but {output_file} is never defined anywhere. Meanwhile customize.toml declares output_dir but SKILL.md has no {workflow.output_dir} reference. Two failure modes collide: undefined fragile-operation argument + silent override no-op.
broken.action: Define output path derivation in Stage 3: 'Write to {workflow.output_dir}/D-02-{project_name}.md' and reference as {output_file} in Stage 4. Replace all implicit path assumptions with {workflow.output_dir}.

broken.title: scan-sources.py has no unit tests
broken.detail: Load-bearing script invoked at every activation for routing (fresh/resume/update). If scan returns wrong state, Stage 1 routing silently misbehaves. validate-requirements.py has 11 tests; scan-sources.py has zero.
broken.action: Create scripts/tests/test-scan-sources.py covering: empty dir → fresh, complete D-02 → update, partial D-02 → resume, project-context discovery, source_docs dedup.

opportunities.name: decision-log-location
opportunities.title: Decision log in references/ instead of skill root
opportunities.description: Per BMad DLW workspace pattern, .decision-log.md should be a peer of SKILL.md (skill root), not in references/. references/ is for runtime-loaded carved-out prompts.
opportunities.action: Move references/.decision-log.md to .decision-log.md at skill root. If references/ only has headless-contract.md left, that's fine — it's a genuine runtime reference.

opportunities.name: headless-dual-description
opportunities.title: Headless contract described in both SKILL.md and references/headless-contract.md
opportunities.description: SKILL.md lines 24-25 summarize headless contract while references/headless-contract.md (41 lines) gives full spec. Dual-description risks divergence on compaction. Principles flag 'multiple files that could be a single instruction' as wasteful.
opportunities.action: Collapse SKILL.md ## Headless Mode to: 'Headless mode: run all stages non-interactively per references/headless-contract.md.' Make the reference self-contained.

opportunities.name: headless-autofix-changelog
opportunities.title: Auto-fix changelog absent from headless return
opportunities.description: Headless return has auto_fixable_count but not what was changed. Pipeline doing traceability downstream cannot audit silent renumbering.
opportunities.action: Add 'auto_fixes' list to headless return schema with type + description per fix.

opportunities.name: stage1c-sibling-skills
opportunities.title: Stage 1c intent gate names no specific sibling skills
opportunities.description: 'If wrong skill, suggest the right one' is generic. LLM improvises skill names, sometimes suggesting non-existent ones.
opportunities.action: Specify: 'If user wants a product brief, suggest hbc-create-prd. If exploratory brainstorming, suggest hbc-brainstorming.'

opportunities.name: headless-mode-collision
opportunities.title: Mode collision (--mode create + existing D-02) undocumented
opportunities.description: If --mode create is passed but complete D-02 exists, skill silently enters Update mode. Automator expecting fresh Create gets unexpected behavior.
opportunities.action: Add 'mode_conflict' blocked reason to headless contract.

opportunities.name: vague-terms-serialization
opportunities.title: vague_terms TOML array → CLI string serialization undocumented
opportunities.description: Script expects comma-separated --vague-terms; customize.toml now stores a TOML array. Resolver's array-to-string behavior is unspecified.
opportunities.action: Add one-line comment in customize.toml documenting the serialization contract.

opportunities.name: template-placeholder-undocumented
opportunities.title: Template {project_name} placeholder undocumented
opportunities.description: Template uses {project_name} which looks like a workflow config variable but is filled by LLM from context.
opportunities.action: Add HTML comment in template clarifying this is LLM-filled, not a config variable.

opportunities.name: decision-log-finalize-audit
opportunities.title: Decision-log finalize audit absent from Stage 5
opportunities.description: DLW pattern requires finalize audit — every decision-log entry confirmed against primary artifact. Stage 5 only says 'append closing session'.
opportunities.action: Add to Stage 5: 'Before closing, audit decision-log entries against D-02.'

opportunities.name: subagent-fallback-parallel-lens
opportunities.title: Graceful degradation for unavailable subagents not specified
opportunities.description: Parallel-lens menu ([P] Party Mode, [A] Advanced) depends on subagents. No fallback specified.
opportunities.action: Add note: 'If subagents unavailable, apply lens perspective directly in current conversation.'

opportunities.name: japanese-section-names-hardcoded
opportunities.title: validate-requirements.py hardcodes Japanese section names
opportunities.description: REQUIRED_SECTIONS uses Japanese strings. English-output D-02 will fail validation on all sections. Latent bug for non-Japanese deployments.
opportunities.action: Make REQUIRED_SECTIONS language-aware or match both Japanese and English section names.

opportunities.name: scan-sources-exit-codes
opportunities.title: scan-sources.py has no sys.exit() calls
opportunities.description: Script does not return meaningful exit codes. Headless callers cannot distinguish success from failure by exit code.
opportunities.action: Add sys.exit(0) on success, sys.exit(1) on fail, sys.exit(2) on error.

strengths.title: Massive improvement: 13 of 16 prior opportunities resolved
strengths.detail: All 3 HIGHs (open-floor opening, headless input contract, headless decision_log) and 10 of 13 MEDIUM/LOW items resolved since B+ analysis. Facilitative patterns are now comprehensive.

strengths.title: Right-sized SKILL.md at 108 lines / 1529 tokens
strengths.detail: Growth from 96→108 lines is explained by load-bearing additions (scan-sources.py invocation, routing logic). No padding, no meta-explanation.

strengths.title: Exemplary intelligence placement
strengths.detail: Two scripts handle all deterministic work: validate-requirements.py (structural checks, vague terms, section validation) and scan-sources.py (state detection, source inventory). LLM reserved for elicitation, contradiction detection, testability judgment.

strengths.title: Complete facilitative patterns coverage
strengths.detail: Open-floor opening, soft-gate elicitation, capture-don't-interrupt, smart defaults from project-context.md, parallel-lens menu with explanations, three-point compaction flush strategy.

strengths.title: Clean customization surface
strengths.detail: 4 workflow-specific scalars covering real variance dimensions (template_path, output_dir, validation_script, vague_terms). TOML array for vague_terms with correct merge semantics. No boolean toggles or identity fields.

strengths.title: Headless mode upgraded from 'adaptable' to 'ready'
strengths.detail: Complete input schema (--sources, --mode, --vague-terms), full return contract with decision_log path, blocked reasons documented. All interaction points auto-resolvable.

recommendations.action: Fix {output_file} wiring: define output path derivation using {workflow.output_dir} in Stage 3, reference in Stage 4 script call (B1)
Create tests for scan-sources.py: fresh/resume/update routing, project-context discovery (B2)
Move .decision-log.md from references/ to skill root (O1)
Collapse headless dual-description: SKILL.md routes to reference, reference is self-contained (O2)
Add auto_fixes list to headless return, document mode_conflict blocked reason (O3, O5)
Name sibling skills in Stage 1c intent gate (O4)
Fix Japanese-only section names in validate-requirements.py (O10)

resolved_since_prior: O1 (HIGH): Open-floor opening added to Stage 2 Discovery
O2 (HIGH): Headless input contract with full arg table + example
O3 (HIGH): decision_log path in headless return schema
O4 (MEDIUM): vague_terms merge chain fixed — CLI arg from resolved value
O5 (MEDIUM): vague_terms now proper TOML array
O6 (MEDIUM): Soft-gate transitions at each Discovery area boundary
O7 (MEDIUM): Compaction flush added at Stages 3 and 4
O8 (MEDIUM): Parallel-lens menu explained with parentheticals
O10 (MEDIUM): Capture-don't-interrupt for glossary terms and business-flow processes
O11 (MEDIUM): Source inventory pre-pass script (scan-sources.py) added and wired
O12 (MEDIUM): validation_script exposed as customize.toml scalar
O14 (LOW): Graceful degradation for Python unavailability

architecture.assessment: Well-structured multi-stage workflow. 108 lines / 1529 tokens — right-sized. One HIGH broken wiring: {output_file} undefined in script invocation, output_dir declared but never consumed. Decision log in references/ should be at skill root. Headless contract dual-description adds compaction risk.

determinism.assessment: Excellent intelligence placement. Two scripts cover all deterministic operations. scan-sources.py is load-bearing but has no tests (B2). output_dir not wired (confirmed by architecture scanner). Low-priority optimizations: template section counter, revision diff.

customization.assessment: Clean and correct surface after prior fixes. 4 workflow scalars covering real variance. Only gap: output_dir wiring mismatch (cross-scanner confirmed). vague_terms serialization contract undocumented but low risk.

enhancement.assessment: Major facilitative patterns improvement. All interaction patterns now present. Three medium gaps: auto-fix changelog for headless, sibling skill names in intent gate, mode collision documentation. Japanese section names in script is a latent bug for non-Japanese deployments.
